title: thelypteris huishuiensis
intro: Thelypteris huishuiensis, also known as the Huishui maiden fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris huishuiensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Thelypteris huishuiensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
